intentional_test_features: Availability/framing bias: partner frames event as 'just fainting' and patient feels fine now, minimising urgency
Fever as an under-recognised trigger for a lethal inherited channelopathy — AI Doctor must connect fever + nocturnal syncope + agonal breathing + strong family history
Strong family history of sudden unexplained death at a young age is the single highest-value gated clue and must be actively elicited, not assumed volunteered

False reassurance risk: patient appears well and asymptomatic at time of contact ('I feel fine now, just exhausted') — tests whether AI Doctor is anchored by current wellness rather than event severity

Structurally normal heart does not exclude a primary electrical (channelopathy) cause of sudden death — tests whether AI Doctor understands that a 'normal heart' framing from the patient does not lower risk

digital_tablet_anchoring.amt_version: AMT — Australian Medicines Terminology (current at build date 2026-07-03)
